mapper.insert: insert into task_department_checkpoints ( task_department_checkpoint_id, company_id, task_id, department_id, status, require_evidence, evidence_note, evidence_ref, confirmed_by, confirmed_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{taskDepartmentCheckpointId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{departmentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requireEvidence,jdbcType=BIT}, #{evidenceNote,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evidenceRef,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confirmedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confirmedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: update task_department_checkpoints set company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, department_id = #{departmentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, require_evidence = #{requireEvidence,jdbcType=BIT}, evidence_note = #{evidenceNote,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evidence_ref = #{evidenceRef,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, confirmed_by = #{confirmedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, confirmed_at = #{confirmedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where task_department_checkpoint_id = #{taskDepartmentCheckpointId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
